raw_consumer_statement:
Documented Cooperation and Immediate Response On XX/XX/year>, I received a voicemail from a representative of American Express ( XXXX ) regarding an open dispute involving XXXX XXXX XXXX ( Reference ID : XXXX ). The voicemail requested that I return the call within 24 hours to provide additional information.

Within approximately 30 minutes of receiving that voicemail, I responded in writing through American Expresss secure Document Submission Center. In that written response, I clearly stated that I am fully willing to cooperate and provide any information necessary to assist in the investigation. 

I explained that, due to work obligations, I am not consistently available for unscheduled phone calls and have previously requested that communications regarding disputes be provided in writing. My request for written communication is solely to ensure accuracy, maintain a complete record, and allow me to provide thorough and precise responses. I explicitly stated that I am not refusing to participate. 

I remain willing to promptly respond to any written questions, documentation requests, or clarification inquiries submitted through the secure portal or by written correspondence. At all times, I have acted in good faith and have demonstrated immediate responsiveness and cooperation.
